steps.expected: The investigation should document whether subpath imports are viable and whether barrel imports tree-shake.
steps.observed: The document says the codebase uses React APIs not exposed from the explored subpaths, notes tree-shaking already works, and concludes the barrel import is the only viable path.

steps.expected: The installed package should be marked tree-shakeable.
The codebase should be using React motion APIs that match the documented constraint.
steps.observed: packages/ui/components/signing-card.tsx:4 imports animate, motion, useMotionTemplate, useMotionValue, and useTransform from framer-motion.

evidence.sharedChecks: Per .factory/library/user-testing.md, build and lint checks are centralized in the parent validator and were not rerun in this read-only flow validation.

steps.expected: The navigation-link pattern should be broadly present across the app.
steps.observed: Read-only inspection found 114 prefetch="intent" matches across 55 TSX files in apps/remix/app.

steps.expected: Core shared navigation surfaces should include intent prefetching.
steps.observed: app-header.tsx and settings-nav-desktop.tsx both show repeated navigation Links with prefetch="intent".

steps.expected: Route-level navigation layouts should also use intent prefetching.
steps.observed: The authenticated admin layout, authenticated root layout, profile layout, and recipient layout each contain Link entries with prefetch="intent".

steps.expected: Any remaining omissions should be explainable by context rather than indicating the pattern was not broadly applied to navigation links.
steps.observed: Remaining examples sampled were table row/action links, an external target="_blank" docs link, and dynamic org/team card links rather than shared navigation/layout links.

searchFindings: apps/remix/app/**/*.tsx contains 114 prefetch="intent" occurrences across 55 files.
Representative coverage spans shared header/settings navigation plus authenticated, admin, profile, and recipient route layouts.
evidence.sharedChecks: Per .factory/library/user-testing.md, build and lint checks are centralized in the parent validator and were not rerun in this read-only flow validation.

summary: Validated 2 bundle-size assertions by read-only inspection. VAL-BUNDLE-003 passed based on documented framer-motion tree-shaking evidence plus installed package metadata, and VAL-BUNDLE-004 passed based on widespread prefetch="intent" usage across 55 app files with representative navigation coverage.
